# API Path Baseline

main_backend_endpoint_count=152
memory_backend_endpoint_count=70
total_endpoint_count=222

## chat_app_server_rs endpoints (method + path)
DELETE /:application_id
DELETE /api/ai-model-configs/:config_id
DELETE /api/contacts/:contact_id
DELETE /api/mcp-configs/:config_id
DELETE /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
DELETE /api/messages/:id
DELETE /api/notepad/folders
DELETE /api/notepad/notes/:note_id
DELETE /api/projects/:id
DELETE /api/projects/:id/contacts/:contact_id
DELETE /api/remote-connections/:id
DELETE /api/sessions/:id
DELETE /api/sessions/:session_id/mcp-servers/:mcp_config_id
DELETE /api/sessions/:session_id/summaries
DELETE /api/sessions/:session_id/summaries/:summary_id
DELETE /api/system-contexts/:context_id
DELETE /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id
DELETE /api/terminals/:id
GET /
GET /:application_id
GET /api/agent_v2/session/:session_id/config
GET /api/agent_v2/status
GET /api/agent_v2/tools
GET /api/agent_v3/status
GET /api/agent_v3/tools
GET /api/ai-model-configs
GET /api/auth/me
GET /api/contacts
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/agent-recalls
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories/:project_id
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/projects
GET /api/fs/download
GET /api/fs/entries
GET /api/fs/list
GET /api/fs/read
GET /api/fs/search
GET /api/mcp-configs
GET /api/mcp-configs/:config_id/resource/config
GET /api/memory-agents
GET /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
GET /api/memory-agents/:agent_id/runtime-context
GET /api/messages
GET /api/messages/:id
GET /api/notepad/folders
GET /api/notepad/init
GET /api/notepad/notes
GET /api/notepad/notes/:note_id
GET /api/notepad/search
GET /api/notepad/tags
GET /api/projects
GET /api/projects/:id
GET /api/projects/:id/changes
GET /api/projects/:id/changes/summary
GET /api/projects/:id/contacts
GET /api/projects/:id/run/catalog
GET /api/remote-connections
GET /api/remote-connections/:id
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/list
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/:transfer_id
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/ws
GET /api/session-summary-job-config
GET /api/sessions
GET /api/sessions/:id
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/mcp-servers
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/messages
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/summaries
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/turns/:user_message_id/process
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/turns/by-turn/:turn_id/process
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/turns/by-turn/:turn_id/runtime-context
GET /api/sessions/:session_id/turns/latest/runtime-context
GET /api/system-context/active
GET /api/system-contexts
GET /api/task-manager/tasks
GET /api/terminals
GET /api/terminals/:id
GET /api/terminals/:id/history
GET /api/terminals/:id/ws
GET /api/ui-prompts/history
GET /api/ui-prompts/pending
GET /api/user-settings
GET /health
PATCH /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
PATCH /api/notepad/folders
PATCH /api/notepad/notes/:note_id
PATCH /api/session-summary-job-config
PATCH /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id
PATCH /api/user-settings
POST /
POST /api/agent-builder/ai-create
POST /api/agent_v2/chat/stream
POST /api/agent_v2/session/:session_id/config
POST /api/agent_v2/session/:session_id/reset
POST /api/agent_v3/chat/guide
POST /api/agent_v3/chat/stop
POST /api/agent_v3/chat/stream
POST /api/agent_v3/session/:session_id/reset
POST /api/ai-model-configs
POST /api/auth/login
POST /api/auth/register
POST /api/chat/stop
POST /api/contacts
POST /api/fs/delete
POST /api/fs/mkdir
POST /api/fs/move
POST /api/fs/touch
POST /api/mcp-configs
POST /api/mcp-configs/resource/config
POST /api/memory-agents
POST /api/messages
POST /api/notepad/folders
POST /api/notepad/notes
POST /api/projects
POST /api/projects/:id/changes/confirm
POST /api/projects/:id/contacts
POST /api/projects/:id/run/analyze
POST /api/projects/:id/run/default
POST /api/projects/:id/run/execute
POST /api/remote-connections
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/disconnect
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/delete
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/download
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/mkdir
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/rename
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/:transfer_id/cancel
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/start
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/upload
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/test
POST /api/remote-connections/test
POST /api/sessions
POST /api/sessions/:session_id/mcp-servers
POST /api/sessions/:session_id/messages
POST /api/system-contexts
POST /api/system-contexts/:context_id/activate
POST /api/system-contexts/ai/evaluate
POST /api/system-contexts/ai/generate
POST /api/system-contexts/ai/optimize
POST /api/task-manager/reviews/:review_id/decision
POST /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id/complete
POST /api/terminals
POST /api/terminals/:id/interrupt
POST /api/terminals/dispatch-command
POST /api/ui-prompts/:prompt_id/respond
PUT /:application_id
PUT /api/ai-model-configs/:config_id
PUT /api/mcp-configs/:config_id
PUT /api/projects/:id
PUT /api/remote-connections/:id
PUT /api/session-summary-job-config
PUT /api/sessions/:id
PUT /api/system-contexts/:context_id
PUT /api/user-settings

## memory_server endpoints (method + path)
DELETE /api/memory/v1/agents/:agent_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/auth/users/:username
DELETE /api/memory/v1/configs/models/:model_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/messages/:message_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/summaries/:summary_id
GET /api/memory/v1/agents
GET /api/memory/v1/agents/:agent_id
GET /api/memory/v1/agents/:agent_id/runtime-context
GET /api/memory/v1/agents/:agent_id/sessions
GET /api/memory/v1/auth/me
GET /api/memory/v1/auth/users
GET /api/memory/v1/configs/agent-memory-job
GET /api/memory/v1/configs/models
GET /api/memory/v1/configs/summary-job
GET /api/memory/v1/configs/summary-rollup-job
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id/agent-recalls
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories/:project_id
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id/projects
GET /api/memory/v1/contacts/:contact_id/projects/:project_id/summaries
GET /api/memory/v1/jobs/runs
GET /api/memory/v1/jobs/stats
GET /api/memory/v1/messages/:message_id
GET /api/memory/v1/projects
GET /api/memory/v1/projects/:project_id/contacts
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/summaries
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/summaries/graph
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/summaries/levels
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/turn-runtime-snapshots/by-turn/:turn_id
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/turn-runtime-snapshots/latest
GET /api/memory/v1/skills
GET /api/memory/v1/skills/:skill_id
GET /api/memory/v1/skills/plugins
GET /api/memory/v1/skills/plugins/detail
GET /health
PATCH /api/memory/v1/agents/:agent_id
PATCH /api/memory/v1/auth/users/:username
PATCH /api/memory/v1/configs/models/:model_id
PATCH /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
POST /api/memory/v1/agents
POST /api/memory/v1/agents/ai-create
POST /api/memory/v1/auth/login
POST /api/memory/v1/auth/users
POST /api/memory/v1/configs/models
POST /api/memory/v1/configs/models/:model_id/test
POST /api/memory/v1/contacts
POST /api/memory/v1/context/compose
POST /api/memory/v1/jobs/agent-memory/run-once
POST /api/memory/v1/jobs/summary-rollup/run-once
POST /api/memory/v1/jobs/summary/run-once
POST /api/memory/v1/project-agent-links/sync
POST /api/memory/v1/projects/sync
POST /api/memory/v1/sessions
POST /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages
POST /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages/batch
POST /api/memory/v1/skills/import-git
POST /api/memory/v1/skills/plugins/install
PUT /api/memory/v1/configs/agent-memory-job
PUT /api/memory/v1/configs/summary-job
PUT /api/memory/v1/configs/summary-rollup-job
PUT /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages/:message_id/sync
PUT /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/sync
PUT /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/turn-runtime-snapshots/:turn_id/sync
